note: Start-rule expand1-to-bare-token parity. When the `?start` rule collapses via expand1 to a single token, Python Lark returns a bare Token; lark-rs used to wrap it as Tree(tok.type_, [tok]) at ACCEPT. Closed by making parse() return a ParseTree (Tree-or-Token); lark-rs now returns the bare NUMBER token too. Minimized find from the differential fuzzer, now a green regression guard.
